name: Tomato Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the bread flour, sugar, dry milk, butter, and salt.
2. Add the chopped sun-dried tomatoes, shredded mozzarella, dried onion, and torn basil leaves to the flour mixture.
3. Pour in the water and yeast, stirring until well combined. If needed, add more flour or water to achieve a smooth dough.
4. Turn off heat source.
5. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake at medium temperature setting for white bread crust until fully baked, about 30-35 minutes.
7. Remove from oven and let cool before slicing.
